name: UMeWorld Inc.
business: AlphaRx is a specialty pharmaceutical company developing therapies to treat and manage pain, including Indaflex for osteoarthritis and ARX-8203. It also operates an online video business through UMeLook, providing foreign video content to Chinese viewers.

exposures.sentence: Indaflex is a topical NSAID (Non-Steroidal Anti-inflammatory Drug) formulation currently in clinical development for the reduction of signs and symptoms associated with osteoarthritis of the knee.
UMeLook is an early stage online video company focuses on providing unique foreign video content to Chinese viewers.

tamClaims.claim: 15 million Americans taking prescription NSAIDs for arthritis, 68 million prescriptions per year
tamClaims.sentence: With an estimated 15 million Americans taking prescription NSAIDs for arthritis, and an estimated 68 million prescriptions a year being written for these products, according to the FDA, the market for NSAIDs is strong.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. prescription market for oral solid NSAIDs was $2.6 billion in 2009
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. prescription market for oral solid NSAIDs was approximately $2.6 billion in 2009, of which 72% was accounted for by Celebrex, according to IMS.
Arthritis is the most common chronic disease in North America and afflicts an estimated 10% of the world's population.
